title: HookVerdict
description: The deterministic allow/reject decision produced by RefundPolicyHook.evaluate for a (ToolCallPayload, PolicyConfig) pair. Identical inputs MUST yield identical verdicts except for evaluated_at (FR-010, SC-001). Constitution Principle I (Determinism Over Probability, NON-NEGOTIABLE).

verdict.description: Machine decision. Never a free-text prose classification.

reason_code.description: Non-null iff verdict == 'reject'. Distinguishes malformed-payload (client bug) from policy-exceedance (business event) from hook-internal-failure (fail-closed per FR-012).

policy_snapshot_version.description: Echoed from PolicyConfig.policy_snapshot_version. Pins the evaluation to a single snapshot (spec §Edge Cases: concurrent policy update).

evaluated_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp of the verdict.

offending_field.description: Dotted field path that tripped the rule, e.g. 'amount'. Non-null iff verdict == 'reject'.

offending_value.description: String-serialized value that tripped the rule; may be null if absent from the payload or redacted.

allOf.description: On reject, reason_code and offending_field MUST be populated.
On allow, reason_code and offending_field MUST be null.
